name: dd-cli
description: Lets AI agents place real DoorDash orders from the terminal — search stores, find deals, build carts, and check out via agentic commerce. Limited beta (US/Canada, macOS, waitlist). Launched July 2026.

skills.name: Store Search
skills.description: Searches DoorDash stores and menus so an agent can find restaurants and items matching a user's request.

skills.name: Cart & Checkout
skills.description: Builds a cart and completes checkout through DoorDash's ordering infrastructure directly from the agent.

skills.name: Deal Discovery
skills.description: Finds current deals and promotions so agents can optimize an order for price before placing it.
